## Source: amazon-inspector (19d252b93a40f90995892530ecd34dc35e9ec7e5b741cb02416fd3dde3e082d8)
The package pnpm-workspaces was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a8175a27dd6e4bd1d1f633557e7292b8ec32858756d638b1056764dab0372b6a)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'pnpm-workspaces' @ 1000.0.3 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
